brand_identity.name: ModulAI
brand_identity.mission: Empowering Indonesian Teachers with AI-driven documentation tools.

design_principles: Clarity First: Teachers are busy. Interfaces must be scanable.
Warm Technology: Use Navy for trust, Orange for energy/warmth.
Local Context: Design for Indonesian needs (WA integration, familiar payment flows).
Dense but Breathing: Dashboards are data-rich, Landing pages are airy.

surfaces.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A5F] text-white hover:bg-[#162B47] shadow-lg shadow-navy-900/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4820A] text-white hover:bg-[#D66E00] shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

landing.hero: Left aligned text, Right side abstract 3D/Illustration. Background subtle gradient slate-50 to white.
landing.features: Bento grid layout. Cards with icons on top-left.
landing.pricing: 3 cards. Center card (Pro/Popular) scale-105 border-orange-500 shadow-xl relative z-10.

checkout.left_column: Sticky. Darker background (Slate-900 or Navy). Contains Order Summary and Testimonials carousel.
checkout.right_column: White background. Multi-step form (Wizard). Clean, focus on inputs.
checkout.testimonials: Show avatar, name, school, and quote. Auto-sliding or manual arrows.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (Navy). Main content area (Light Slate).
dashboard.stats: Top row cards: Token Balance, Total Generated, Plan Status.
dashboard.history_table: Clean rows, status badges, action buttons (Download/Edit) on right.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, size 20px for UI, 24px for Nav.

animations.micro: Hover lift (-2px), Active scale (0.98), Focus ring (2px).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Navy text on white is legible. Avoid light grey text on white.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have visible labels or aria-labels.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Keep it clean.
Ensure mobile responsiveness for all tables (use scroll-x or card view on mobile).
For the Checkout page, strictly follow the 'SantaiScale' reference: Left Testimonials, Right Form.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn components with the custom colors defined above.
2. Create the Checkout page first as it is a critical requirement.
3. Ensure the 'Token System' logic is visible in the UI (Show cost per document).
4. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and dashboard placeholders.
